data.debug_attr_logging: Debug: log all attribute values to CSV
data.debug_raw_logging: Debug: log raw BLE packets to CSV

data_description.device_key: 10-character hex key unique to your device (e.g. bd236b1695). Found at bytes 4–13 of init packet 6 in a btsnoop/PCAPdroid capture of the Cleanergy app. Leave blank to use the built-in fallback key.
data_description.continuous_connection: Keep the Bluetooth connection open permanently instead of polling every 30 seconds. Captures infrequent sensor updates (e.g. battery voltage) but blocks the official app from connecting at the same time.
data_description.debug_attr_logging: Write all received attribute values (including unknown ones and attr-78 mystery values) to oupes_mega_<addr>_attrs.csv in your HA config folder. Emits warnings in the HA log for unrecognised attr-78 values.
data_description.debug_raw_logging: Write every raw BLE notification payload as hex to oupes_mega_<addr>_raw.csv in your HA config folder. Useful for offline analysis with the debug_info scripts.

user.title: OUPES Mega Power Station
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your OUPES Mega device. The device advertises via BLE as **TT**. If a device was already found nearby it will be pre-filled below.

data_description.device_key: 10-character hex key unique to your device (e.g. bd236b1695). Found at bytes 4–13 of init packet 6 in a btsnoop/PCAPdroid capture of the Cleanergy app. Leave blank to use the built-in example key, which may not work on your unit.

bluetooth_confirm.title: OUPES Mega Power Station
bluetooth_confirm.description: Found **{name}** ({address}) nearby. Enter your device key to add it to Home Assistant.

data_description.device_key: 10-character hex key unique to your device (e.g. bd236b1695). Found in a btsnoop/PCAPdroid capture of the Cleanergy app. Leave blank to use the built-in example key, which may not work on your unit.

error.invalid_address: Invalid Bluetooth MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.invalid_device_key: Device key must be exactly 10 hexadecimal characters (e.g. bd236b1695).
